required_preferences.fact: Prepares fresh plant-based low-sodium dinners five nights a week — avoids all processed foods and never orders delivery, even on special occasions

supersedes.fact: Prepares fresh vegetarian dinners five nights a week — never orders delivery except for special occasions

required_preferences.fact: Now participates in frequent in-person meetings with interdisciplinary faculty twice weekly as a co-chair, supplementing asynchronous communication with direct collaboration

supersedes.fact: Prefers asynchronous communication with her research team — rarely calls or holds impromptu meetings

required_preferences.fact: Schedules all necessary showers and hair washes for the evenings, using disposable cleansing wipes in the mornings to comply with monitor water exposure restrictions
Reviews graduate student drafts within 72 hours but provides feedback only in writing — avoids real-time editing sessions
Enjoys jigsaw puzzles with her son after dinner — avoids screen-based games in the evening

persona: A mid-career sociologist with multiple published journal articles
